title: Redaction guard for capture pipelines
description: Source-mining audit item #4 (agentcairn pattern; security gap flagged by zera's survey, confirmed absent): shared redaction module (known credential formats + URL userinfo + tuned high-entropy fallback) wired warn-and-redact into map_emergence.py, map_repair.py, and local_runner.py write paths. Packet: MAP_System/inbox/helpers/redaction-guard-packet.md. Starts after TASK-190 release.
acceptance_criteria: Known credential formats, URL userinfo, and a documented-threshold entropy fallback are detected; replacement is [REDACTED:<pattern-name>].
Wired warn-and-redact (never reject) into emergence, repair, and local_runner write paths; findings go to stderr, clean text to disk.
Tests cover each pattern family, entropy true/false-positive guards (git SHA, UUID), and one wired-path integration; suite green.
Threat model updated; events.jsonl appenders explicitly out of scope with a follow-up captured.
